command:
echo "=== SAKURA config: does she respond to ALL group messages? ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "grep -A6 '^telegram:' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml"

echo ""
echo "=== Key question: is Sakura's require_mention false? (that's why she answers everything) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "grep require_mention /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml"

echo ""
echo "=== REMY config: mention required (correct) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "python3 -c \"import json; d=json.load(open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json')); print(json.dumps(d['channels']['telegram']['groups'], indent=2))\""

echo ""
echo "=== Both bots' usernames (so we know what mention triggers which) ==="
echo -n "Sakura: "; ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.202 "curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getMe' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)[\"result\"][\"username\"])'"
echo -n "Remy: "; ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 "curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/getMe' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)[\"result\"][\"username\"])'"
